---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that Crucible doesn't let you do, or makes painful?

## Proposed solution

What would the ideal behaviour look like from your perspective?

## Alternatives you've considered

Workarounds, similar features in other tools, things you tried first.

## Scope check

Crucible is deliberately opinionated about the card → plan → branch → commit → PR shape. Proposals that broaden that scope significantly (e.g. "make Crucible run non-coding tasks") may be better as a separate tool. Quick self-check: does your request fit inside that loop, or would it require a new one?

- [ ] Fits inside the existing loop
- [ ] Requires a new loop (explain below)

## Anything else

Mockups, links, related PRs.
